name: MessageGuard
install_msg:
Thanks for installing.
If you enjoy my work, you can donate at [buymeacoffee](<https://buymeacoffee.com/ltzmax>)
description: A unified message moderation cog combining spoiler blocking, attachment restriction, and forwarded message deletion.
short: A unified message moderation cog combining spoiler blocking, attachment restriction, and forwarded message deletion.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any End User Data.
